mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.name, IFNULL(s.play_count,0) AS playCount, IFNULL(c.collectCount,0) AS collectCount FROM song s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS collectCount FROM collect WHERE type = 0 GROUP BY song_id ) c ON s.id = c.song_id ORDER BY playCount DESC, collectCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT s.id, s.name, IFNULL(s.play_count,0) AS playCount, 0 AS collectCount FROM song s ORDER BY playCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.id, s.name, 0 AS playCount, IFNULL(c.collectCount,0) AS collectCount FROM song s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS collectCount FROM collect WHERE type = 0 GROUP BY song_id ) c ON s.id = c.song_id ORDER BY collectCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT si.id, si.name, IFNULL(SUM(s.play_count),0) AS playCount, IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(c.collectCount,0)),0) AS collectCount FROM singer si LEFT JOIN song s ON s.singer_id = si.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS collectCount FROM collect WHERE type = 0 GROUP BY song_id ) c ON s.id = c.song_id GROUP BY si.id, si.name ORDER BY playCount DESC, collectCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM consumer WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY DATE(create_time) ASC
